description: Sends a message with inline keyboard buttons to a Telegram chat

credentialKey.description: The key to access the Telegram bot token credential

chatId.description: The chat ID to send the message to

text.description: The text message to send (supports HTML formatting)

keyboard.description: Array of button rows, where each row is an array of button objects with 'text' and 'callback_data' properties

callback_data.description: Data to be sent when button is pressed

url.description: Optional URL to open when button is pressed
